definitions.usage_example: The house is beautiful. Furthermore, it's in a great location.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The house is beautiful. Furthermore, it's in a great location.]

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Por consiguiente / En consecuencia]
definitions.usage_example: It rained heavily; consequently, the match was canceled.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It rained heavily; consequently, the match was canceled.]

definitions.usage_example: The plan is risky. Moreover, it is expensive.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The plan is risky. Moreover, it is expensive.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como un punto adicional; además (usado para añadir un punto más fuerte y relacionado).]
definitions.usage_context_es: As a further matter; besides (used to add a stronger, related point).

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: De ahí que / Por lo tanto]
definitions.usage_example: He didn't study; hence his failure.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He didn't study; hence his failure.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como consecuencia; por esta razón.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As a consequence; for this reason.

definitions.usage_example: The hotel is closed; that is, we cannot stay there.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE that is AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The hotel is closed; that is, we cannot stay there.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para explicar o especificar lo que se acaba de decir (a menudo abreviado como 'i.e.').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to explain or specify what was just said (often abbreviated as 'i.e.').

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Por lo tanto / Por consiguiente (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Por esa razón; consecuentemente (usado en habla o escritura formal).]
definitions.usage_context_es: For that reason; consequently (used in formal speech or writing).

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Así pues / Por lo tanto (formal)]
definitions.usage_example: He did not study; thus, he failed.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He did not study; thus, he failed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Como resultado o consecuencia de esto; por lo tanto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: As a result or consequence of this; therefore.
